title: Stelis microtis
taxonomy: Stelis microtis is a species of orchid. Stelis microtis is classified within the family Orchidaceae. It belongs to the genus Stelis. This classification places it within the subtribe Pleurothallidinae, and the tribe Epidendroideae. The exact classification within the subtribe and tribe is a precise categorization of the plant.

Its unique composition may offer benefits in the treatment of certain ailments. intro: Stelis microtis is a species of orchid native to the tropical and subtropical regions of Central and South America. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its potential to support respiratory health and alleviate symptoms of bronchitis and asthma due to its expectorant properties. The bioactive constituents of Stelis microtis include flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic acids, which are believed to contribute to its medicinal effects. Stelis microtis is often used in traditional herbal medicine and can be found in various preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to support respiratory health and alleviate cold-related symptoms.
